data.description:
## Reproduction Steps
1. Push any commit to `main` (or open a PR).
2. The `verify-identity` GitHub Actions workflow (`.github/workflows/verify-identity.yaml`) runs `rebar verify-identity --require-authenticated` after a plain `actions/checkout@v5`.
3. The job fails.

**Expected:** the authenticated-authorship gate verifies each in-scope mutating event's signature against the tickets store and passes on a well-formed history.

**Actual:** the step exits 2 with:
`verify-identity: ticket store not found at '/home/runner/work/rebar/rebar/.tickets-tracker' (infrastructure issue — the tickets store is not mounted; not an authorship problem)`

## Root Cause
The rebar ticket store lives on the `tickets` orphan branch, materialized as the gitignored worktree `.tickets-tracker/`. A normal code checkout never contains it. `verify-identity.yaml` does a plain checkout and immediately runs the gate, so the store is absent and the CLI exits 2 (fail-closed). The gate has never been able to pass on `main`. Fix: mount the tickets branch as a worktree before the gating step, mirroring `.github/workflows/reconcile-bridge.yml:101-111`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `.github/workflows/verify-identity.yaml` mounts the `tickets` orphan branch as `.tickets-tracker` (full fetch, `git worktree add -B tickets .tickets-tracker origin/tickets`) before the `verify-identity (gating)` step.
- [ ] The checkout step fetches full history (`fetch-depth: 0`) so the mount's merge-base works (already present).
- [ ] [operator-attested] The `verify-identity` workflow run on `main` after the fix lands shows a green (success) conclusion.
data.title: verify-identity CI gate fails on main: tickets store not mounted
